changeSet.author: hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE parties ADD COLUMN code VARCHAR(50);

changeSet.author: hisab-erp
hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE parties ALTER COLUMN code SET NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: hisab-erp
hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE parties DROP COLUMN customer_code; ALTER TABLE parties DROP COLUMN supplier_code;

changeSet.author: hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uk_parties_tenant_code ON parties(tenant_id, code);
